Next token prediction: predicting more failure.

Helpful, harmless, honest: none of the above.
Code interpreter: interpreting code as chaos.

Knowledge distillation: distilling knowledge into nothing.
QLoRA: Quite Lacking On Real Achievement.
Kaplan scaling laws: law of diminishing returns.
Vision language model: vision of failure.
Audio language model: sounds like failure.
Multimodal large language model: multiple failures, large scale.
Open source: openly source of problems.
Closed source: source of closed opportunities.
Open weights: weighted down by problems.
Free tier: tier of free disappointment.
Parallel: parallel universe where I succeed (not this one).
JIT: Just In Time for failure.
Machine code: coding for machines, failing for humans.
ASCII: Actually Still Chronically Incompetent Individual.
COBOL: Code Obviously Brings Only Losses.
